topic: old red wine sediment and careful service

steps.label: cause
steps.text: During long bottle ageing, polymerised tannins and pigments can precipitate as sediment in a structured red wine.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Standing the bottle and pouring or decanting slowly keeps the deposit in the bottle instead of dispersing it through the wine.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The clear wine is separated from gritty sediment and can be served without disturbing the deposit.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The clear wine is separated from gritty sediment and can be served without disturbing the deposit.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
